title: neottia mertensiana
intro: Neottia mertensiana, also known as Mertens' tooth-orchid or Mertens' lady's-tresses, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Neottia mertensiana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and skin-related ailments.
